pkgmetadata.longdescription: python-graphql-clientSimple GraphQL client for Python 2.7+ Installshpip install graphqlclient Usagepyfrom graphqlclient import GraphQLClientclient GraphQLClient(httpgraphql-swapi.parseapp.com)result client.execute({ allFilms { films { title } }})print(result) AuthorizationAuthorization tokens can be added to the request using the clients inject_token methodpyclient.inject_token(very-long-and-secure-token)which defaults to http header name Authorization.An alternative http header name for the token can be set by passing in the alternative header name, e.g. for x-api-keypyclient.inject_token(very-long-and-secure-token,x-api-key) License[MIT License](httpopensource.orglicensesMIT)
